name: Streaming Simulator
description:
❄️ Welcome to Streaming Simulator ❄️

Become a streamer on Twitch, YouTube or TikTok! Do whatever you want, it's up to your choice to stream anything! You can get donations, influence the chat, and gain more viewers as your live stream progresses.

Using a good proxy is highly recommended for proper function. This bot may be buggy if you use JLLM.
